name: openclaw-cron-monitor
description: Read-only dashboard and tools for OpenClaw cron jobs and recurring task runs.

interface.shortDescription: Monitor OpenClaw cron jobs and recurring task runs.
interface.longDescription: A read-only local dashboard and extension package for OpenClaw cron jobs. It shows schedule projections, run status, history, logs, delivery settings, session details, model settings, and timeout values without editing jobs.
